testcase.name: test_web_home_public_reachable

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ConnectTimeout: HTTPConnectionPool(host='20.249.208.224', port=3000): Max retries exceeded with url: / (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPConnection(host='20.249.208.224', port=3000) at 0xfacc28193210>, 'Connection to 20.249.208.224 timed out. (connect timeout=12)'))

testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connection.py:204: in _new_conn sock = connection.create_connection( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/connection.py:85: in create_connection raise err /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/connection.py:73: in create_connection sock.connect(sa) E TimeoutError: timed out
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:787: in urlopen response = self._make_request( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:493: in _make_request conn.request( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connection.py:500: in request self.endheaders() /usr/local/lib/python3.11/http/client.py:1318: in endheaders self._send_output(message_body, encode_chunked=encode_chunked) /usr/local/lib/python3.11/http/client.py:1078: in _send_output self.send(msg) /usr/local/lib/python3.11/http/client.py:1016: in send self.connect() /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connection.py:331: in connect self.sock = self._new_conn() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connection.py:213: in _new_conn raise ConnectTimeoutError( E urllib3.exceptions.ConnectTimeoutError: (<HTTPConnection(host='20.249.208.224', port=3000) at 0xfacc28193210>, 'Connection to 20.249.208.224 timed out. (connect timeout=12)')
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/adapters.py:645: in send resp = conn.urlopen( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:841: in urlopen retries = retries.increment( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/retry.py:535: in increment raise MaxRetryError(_pool, url, reason) from reason # type: ignore[arg-type] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E urllib3.exceptions.MaxRetryError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='20.249.208.224', port=3000): Max retries exceeded with url: / (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPConnection(host='20.249.208.224', port=3000) at 0xfacc28193210>, 'Connection to 20.249.208.224 timed out. (connect timeout=12)'))
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests/test_nexus_deployment_public.py:19: in test_web_home_public_reachable response = fetch(f"{BASE_HTTP}:3000") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/test_nexus_deployment_public.py:14: in fetch return requests.get(url, timeout=TIMEOUT_SECONDS, allow_redirects=False) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/api.py:73: in get return request("get", url, params=params, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/api.py:59: in request return session.request(method=method, url=url, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:592: in request resp = self.send(prep, **send_kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:706: in send r = adapter.send(request, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/adapters.py:666: in send raise ConnectTimeout(e, request=request) E requests.exceptions.ConnectTimeout: HTTPConnectionPool(host='20.249.208.224', port=3000): Max retries exceeded with url: / (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPConnection(host='20.249.208.224', port=3000) at 0xfacc28193210>, 'Connection to 20.249.208.224 timed out. (connect timeout=12)'))

testcase.name: test_docs_home_public_reachable

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ConnectTimeout: HTTPConnectionPool(host='20.249.208.224', port=3001): Max retries exceeded with url: / (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPConnection(host='20.249.208.224', port=3001) at 0xfacc2811d150>, 'Connection to 20.249.208.224 timed out. (connect timeout=12)'))

testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connection.py:204: in _new_conn sock = connection.create_connection( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/connection.py:85: in create_connection raise err /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/connection.py:73: in create_connection sock.connect(sa) E TimeoutError: timed out

(connect timeout=12)')
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/adapters.py:645: in send resp = conn.urlopen( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:841: in urlopen retries = retries.increment( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/retry.py:535: in increment raise MaxRetryError(_pool, url, reason) from reason # type: ignore[arg-type] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E urllib3.exceptions.MaxRetryError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='20.249.208.224', port=3001): Max retries exceeded with url: / (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPConnection(host='20.249.208.224', port=3001) at 0xfacc2811d150>, 'Connection to 20.249.208.224 timed out. (connect timeout=12)'))
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests/test_nexus_deployment_public.py:25: in test_docs_home_public_reachable response = fetch(f"{BASE_HTTP}:3001") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/test_nexus_deployment_public.py:14: in fetch return requests.get(url, timeout=TIMEOUT_SECONDS, allow_redirects=False) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/api.py:73: in get return request("get", url, params=params, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/api.py:59: in request return session.request(method=method, url=url, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:592: in request resp = self.send(prep, **send_kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:706: in send r = adapter.send(request, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/adapters.py:666: in send raise ConnectTimeout(e, request=request) E requests.exceptions.ConnectTimeout: HTTPConnectionPool(host='20.249.208.224', port=3001): Max retries exceeded with url: / (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPConnection(host='20.249.208.224', port=3001) at 0xfacc2811d150>, 'Connection to 20.249.208.224 timed out. testcase.name: test_admin_public_returns_401_basic_auth

(connect timeout=12)'))

testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connection.py:204: in _new_conn sock = connection.create_connection( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/connection.py:85: in create_connection raise err /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/connection.py:73: in create_connection sock.connect(sa) E TimeoutError: timed out

(connect timeout=12)')

(connect timeout=12)'))
